name: Phantom Knights' Wing
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影翼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファントム・ウィング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 500 ATK, also the first time that target would be destroyed by battle or card effect this turn, it is not destroyed. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "The Phantom Knights" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Phantom Knights' Wing" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 500 ATK, also the first time that target would be destroyed by battle or card effect this turn, it is not destroyed. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "The Phantom Knights" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Phantom Knights' Wing" once per turn.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
Banishes other cards when they leave the field
